title: Warm Molten Korean Kiwifruit Skewers
description: A light and refreshing Korean dessert featuring charred kiwifruit, perfect for warm evenings. This sugar-free friendly dish is emulsified to perfection.

ingredients.name: Kiwifruit
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread kiwifruit pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, rice vinegar, and honey substitute until well combined.
Brush the kiwifruit skewers with the gochujang mixture, making sure they are fully coated.
Brush the grill or grill pan with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kiwifruit skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are charred and slightly caramelized.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and chopped fresh mint leaves over the kiwifruit skewers.
Serve the warm molten kiwifruit skewers immediately, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
